'''zhajoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ivorist|ivorist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-j-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ivorist|ivorist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhajoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæjereth|zhæjereth]] || [[word:zhæjerej|zhæjerej]] || [[word:zhæjeresh|zhæjeresh]] || [[word:zhæjere|zhæjere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhajojoroth|zhajojoroth]] || [[word:zhajojoroj|zhajojoroj]] || [[word:zhajojorosh|zhajojorosh]] || [[word:zhajojoro|zhajojoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhajoroth|zhajoroth]] || [[word:zhajoroj|zhajoroj]] || [[word:zhajorosh|zhajorosh]] || [[word:zhajoro|zhajoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhajofroth|zhajofroth]] || [[word:zhajofroj|zhajofroj]] || [[word:zhajofrosh|zhajofrosh]] || [[word:zhajofrof|zhajofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhajorotho|zhajorotho]] || [[word:zhajorojo|zhajorojo]] || [[word:zhajorosho|zhajorosho]] || [[word:zhajoroko|zhajoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhajoroth|zhajoroth]] || [[word:zhajoroj|zhajoroj]] || [[word:zhajorosh|zhajorosh]] || [[word:zhajoro|zhajoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhajorothol|zhajorothol]] || [[word:zhajorojol|zhajorojol]] || [[word:zhajoroshol|zhajoroshol]] || [[word:zhajorokol|zhajorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhajorothotho|zhajorothotho]] || [[word:zhajorojojo|zhajorojojo]] || [[word:zhajoroshosho|zhajoroshosho]] || [[word:zhajoroko|zhajoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhajorothon|zhajorothon]] || [[word:zhajorojon|zhajorojon]] || [[word:zhajoroshon|zhajoroshon]] || [[word:zhajorokon|zhajorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhajorothoro|zhajorothoro]] || [[word:zhajorojoro|zhajorojoro]] || [[word:zhajoroshoro|zhajoroshoro]] || [[word:zhajorokoro|zhajorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
